title: IFR25KU Official Standard Client ModPack 202509
description: Client-side Modpack for the standard play environment envisioned by the IFR25KU developer — September 2025 Edition.
body:
## Client-side Modpack

This Modpack is a client-side variant of the server Modpack.

The sections below reuse the server Modpack description.

Differences from the server edition:

- To enhance the gameplay experience, it includes several optional mods.

## Concept

This Modpack provides the standard mod setup envisioned by the [IFR25KU](https://modrinth.com/mod/ifr25ku) developer.

There are two editions of this Modpack:

- [Server Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ifr25ku-server-2509)
- [Client Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ifr25ku-client-2509)

The contents of this Modpack are identical to those on the official *IFR25KU Server*, which also serves as a testbed for IFR25KU.

This Modpack lets you reproduce that setup.

## Included Mods

Below is a summary of included mods.

For the complete list of mods, see the dependencies on each version’s page in the Versions tab.

### Main Mods

These are the principal mods that define this Modpack, listed in order of thematic importance.

1. [IFR25KU: The Institute of Fairy Research 2025 Kakera Unofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/ifr25ku) - Representation of the *MirageFairy* worldview
    - *MirageFairy* unfolds in a science-fiction world governed by fantastical physical laws.
    - The *MirageFairy2024* storyline is set on a planet where plants have gone feral after being modified by an ancient civilization known as **The Institute of Fairy Research**.
    - Original crops and crossbreeding to create improved cultivars.
    - Equip fairies obtained from items such as Mirage Flour to gain various passive effects.
    - Tools crafted from various mod-specific materials.
1. [Magitech -Arcane Engineering-](https://modrinth.com/mod/magitech_mod) - Fusion of technology and magic
    - *Magitech* constructs magical theory through science and treats mana like electricity, blending the romanticism of the Industrial Revolution with the mystique of arcane arts.
    - Tools crafted through parts synthesis.
    - Magic-based combat.
    - Alchemy-driven crafting.
1. [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
1. [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
1. [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
1. [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
1. [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)
1. [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)

The overall theme of this Modpack is technology and magic, with agriculture and logistics as subthemes.

Some mods provide adventure elements such as biomes and dungeons, along with ways to upgrade equipment and player abilities.

### Gameplay Enhancement Mods

These mods are included to improve the gameplay experience.

- [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled)

Several other mods also add or tweak minor features.

### Integration and Dependency Mods

Also included:

- Add-on-like mods for the above mods
- Integration mods between the above mods
- Dependencies required by the above mods

## Official Discord

For support and info on the official *IFR25KU Server*, join the Discord linked on this page (primarily in Japanese).
